heading: Use of United States mails
label: 354 Use of United States mails
text: The Commission may use the United States mails in the same manner and upon the same conditions as other departments and agencies of the United States.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under , Government Organization and Employees.Dec. 16, 1967section 220(a)(1) of Pub. L. 90–206section 3110 of Title 5
